name: Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells hoods, ovens, built-in hobs, built-in dishwashers, and refrigerators. It also produces a range of accessories, such as air recycle sets, aluminum flexible ducts, inox wall panels, decorative grids, aluminum cassette filters, outlets, metal bars, and carbon filters. The company was formerly known as Gumusfon Metal Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. in 2005. Silverline Endustri ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
